entry.title: How to skip damaged files in SAP PI file adapter?

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - How can I run a automation project for a long time?
entry.content: Which version are you using ?. i am also facing same issue mine is disconnecting in few minutes i.e agent is getting shutdown

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION GETTING ERROR 500 IN RBSC PORTAL FOR AGENT UPDATE
entry.content: Anyone?

entry.title: Re: Adapting to technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Updates for SAP S/4HANA and SAP ERP
entry.content:
We also have the problem with CUFE not being correct - because the amounts used in the CUFE calculation are the USD amounts from the SD invoice - whereas the amounts we report in XML has been converted into COP after the code adjustments we have done to convert from USD to COP in XML.

I have a really hard time understanding why we as customers have to do a lot of extra ABAP code because SAP standard do not support foreign currency handling in Colombia. When we decided to use DRC we expected that SAP would support us with a solution that at least live up to the legal requirements described by DIAN. Instead each customer now have to solve the challenges of fixing currency conversions to live up to DIAN's requirements.

Arne Maagaard

entry.title: Re: Content Enricher - Multiple fields comparison
entry.content: Any pointers will be of help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Allocations Management Migration Update
entry.content:
Please vote on IR 324339 if you want allocation rules maintenance to continue to work with standard planning license instead of professional license.
And on IR 325083 for ability to load rule tables.

entry.title: Two new hire data in position after moving the candidate from MPH to EC
entry.content:
Hello all , 

 

When a candidate move from onboarding manage pending hire to EC with few changes in position and hire date in MPH , after moved to EC noticed that having a two new hire event in position with one empty data and changed data.

please do let me know possible way to avoid this issue?

Thanks and regards,

Dhanush Kumar

entry.title: Re: Pareto chart in SAC
entry.content: On a side note: PARETO CHarts as a chart type should be available as a standard in SAC IMHO

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA technical replacement for FK01 BDC Create Vendor with reference
entry.content:
Dear Gitte ,

I checked the original program.
It seems in can be used to process more than one vendor, copying it to a new company code is just done, if he is not already created in that company code. If that’s the case, he is simply changed, if needed.

So far so good. I analyzed the possibilities SAP gives us here in the meanwhile a little bit more in detail.
It seems I can use the class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN to create the vendor in a new company code.
To get the “template”, I can get the Details using class CL_MDBPCVI_READER with interface Method EXTRACT_DATA.
At least, that’s the current plan, but I need to verify this in a small sample program.

A Bapi that would encapsulate all this would be nice, but such a thing seems not to be available.

KR

Markus

entry.title: Re: Employee status for the notice period employees should get changed to Serving notice period

Hello:

Thanks for your blog.

I believe Pareto chart as a chart type should be available as a standard chart type in SAC though.

entry.title: Valuation type addition to material in-OMS2
entry.content:
I tried to assigned valuation type to existing material through OMS2- However It start loading for infinite time while saving. Hence decided to work from start but

Whenever I tried to create material type in OMS2 valuation type automatically getting changed hence facing challenges in PR/PO creation. It should be by valuation area in both type but not able to save it because it take infinite time to save the data. 
please suggest a way how can i tackle this situation.

@SAPMM SAP Master Data Governance @Sapsd

entry.title: Failed to create form. Please check the form attributes
entry.content:

I want to create a UI in SAP B1(SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402  (64-bit)) but encountered an error saying, 'Failed to create form. Please check the form attributes.' I've initially checked the attributes as shown in the attached image and didn't find anything wrong. How do I fix this, any ideas? 

 


Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Standard Unit of measur...

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content:
Double check your configuration.

Do you have in Messages > Output control > Message types > Define Message type for Purchase order > Fine-tunes control: Purchase order (t-code OMQN) your CIG condition type with both short descriptions - New and Change?

 

What about WE20 (Partner profile) setting? In Message control tab for PO doe you have both EF ME10 - New and Change?

entry.title: SAP Ariba Cloud implementation - Need for BDC / LSMW
entry.content:
We are looking for LSMW / BDC type of development in SAP Ariba cloud environment to update two fields in 100 plus contract data. How to implement such requirement ? Kindly advise.

Regards

Pradeep Kuamr Shah

+919717887796

entry.title: SAP Central Finance (Cfin): Project Replication Enhancement for PREL/CRTD Status
entry.content:
Introduction

In Central Finance, Standard Replication of Project/WBS from source to Central Finance are facilitated via IDOCs. The Intermediate Document for projects contains the project data for replication. As soon as the ALE outbound and inbound configuration is set up, the replication starts. When you release a new project or WBS element or save a change to existing project master data, the IDoc is sent to the Central Finance system. (Config of Central Project replication is not the scope, you can refer to blog by Nitin Gupta - Central Project for the same).

There are business practice or requirement where Customer does not release the project but release/Teco/Setc the WBE in source system to allow the FI or CO document with WBE as account assignment. As per standard, project can be replicated only when it is changed to Released status.

Resolution

You can implement Badi BadI PS_FUNCTION_SWITCH to facilitate ALE distribution for Projects that are in created or partially released status.  This functionality can be switched-on in method IF_PS_FUNCTION_SWITCH~GET_SWITCH by implementing the below statement:

SWITCH_VALUES-PREL_ELEM_REPLICATE = ’X'.

Once implemented the Project can be replicated in same status as in source – PREL or CRTD.

Side Effect

In perfect world, WBE started getting replicated without release, Badi has done it job, Business requirement is met and everyone is happy. However this Enhancement comes with a side Effect.

In an ideal situation, once a project is released in the source system and thus replicated to the Central Finance system, you cannot delete WBS elements anymore. You can enter a deletion flag in the source system and the system status DLFL is replicated to the Central Finance system.

This statement holds true only when projects were replicated in REL status. Since we are forcing the replication in created status as well, you have unintentionally given added authorization to Business user who can now delete the WBE in Created status (only) which has already been replicated to CFIN system. This inturn creates a very tricky situation where WBE does not exist in source but available in Target.

Fix

Implement the SAP Note - 3450691 - WBS deleted in Source is not replicated in Target

Below are the change code for S4Core

...

form check_ale_active changing ale_active.

  data: it_filterobjects like bdi_fobj   occurs 0 with header line,

        it_receivers     like bdi_logsys occurs 0 with header line.

*>>>> START OF DELETION <<<<<

  ale_active = flg_ale_active.

  check: flg_ale_active is initial.

*>>>> END OF DELETION <<<<<<<

*>>>> START OF INSERTION <<<<

  DATA : switch_vals TYPE psswitch_functions .                              "Note 3450691

  PERFORM get_ps_function_switch(saplcnau) CHANGING switch_vals IF FOUND.

  ale_active = flg_ale_active.

  check: flg_ale_active is initial.

  IF switch_vals-prel_elem_replicate IS INITIAL.                            "Note 3450691

*>>>> END OF INSERTION <<<<<<

...

  CALL FUNCTION 'STATUS_CHECK'

       exporting

            objnr             = *proj-objnr

            status            = 'I0001'

       exceptions

            object_not_found  = 1

            status_not_active = 2.

*>>>> START OF DELETION <<<<<

  CHECK sy-subrc = 2.

*>>>> END OF DELETION <<<<<<<

*>>>> START OF INSERTION <<<<

  CHECK sy-subrc = 2.

  ENDIF.                                                                    "Note 3450691

*>>>> END OF INSERTION <<<<<<

...

*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*

*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*

*& Object          REPS LCJWBF63

*& Object Header   FUGR CJWB

*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*

*& FORM STATUS_LOVM_ABGS

*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*

...

  DATA:

    act_warning_only,                  "Nur Warnung, wenn Saldo <> 0

    aib_modus       LIKE t020-aktyp,

    l_status_lokz   LIKE jstat OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE,

  lv_change_allowed TYPE abap_bool,                       " note 2998796

    l_ale_active    TYPE c.

*>>>> START OF DELETION <<<<<

  IF flg_exec IS INITIAL.

*>>>> END OF DELETION <<<<<<<

*>>>> START OF INSERTION <<<<

  DATA : switch_vals TYPE psswitch_functions .                              "Note 3450691

  PERFORM get_ps_function_switch(saplcnau) CHANGING switch_vals IF FOUND.

  IF flg_exec IS INITIAL.

*>>>> END OF INSERTION <<<<<<

...

        PERFORM check_ale_active(saplcjdw) CHANGING l_ale_active.

        IF NOT l_ale_active IS INITIAL.

* Kein ALE-Verteiltes (und freigegebenes) PSP-Element löschen

*>>>> START OF DELETION <<<<<

          CALL FUNCTION 'STATUS_CHECK'

*>>>> END OF DELETION <<<<<<<

*>>>> START OF INSERTION <<<<

          IF switch_vals-prel_elem_replicate IS INITIAL.                            "Note 3450691

          CALL FUNCTION 'STATUS_CHECK'

*>>>> END OF INSERTION <<<<<<

...

               EXPORTING

                    objnr             = prps-objnr

                    status            = 'I0001'  "eröffnet

               EXCEPTIONS

                    object_not_found  = 1

                    status_not_active = 2

                    OTHERS            = 3.

          IF sy-subrc = 2.

*>>>> START OF DELETION <<<<<

            MESSAGE e014(2054ale) WITH

                                  prps-posid prps-psphi INTO g_msg.

            PERFORM put_sy_message IN PROGRAM SAPLCO2O.

            EXIT.

          ENDIF.

        ENDIF.

*>>>> END OF DELETION <<<<<<<

*>>>> START OF INSERTION <<<<

            MESSAGE e014(2054ale) WITH

                                  prps-posid prps-psphi INTO g_msg.

            PERFORM put_sy_message IN PROGRAM SAPLCO2O.

            EXIT.

          ENDIF.

          ELSE.                                                                     "Note 3450691

            MESSAGE e014(2054ale) WITH

                                  prps-posid prps-psphi INTO g_msg.

            PERFORM put_sy_message IN PROGRAM SAPLCO2O.

            EXIT.

          ENDIF.

        ENDIF.

*>>>> END OF INSERTION <<<<<<

...

*&--------------------------------------------------------------------*

 

After above changes, you will get below error while trying to delete the WBE in CRTD status

 

 

Conclusion:

While Early status project release is good solution to meet the business requirement it should carefully implemented to eliminate any side effects.

Reference Note:

3450691 - WBS deleted in Source is not replicated in Target

2851991 - Enhancing the filter objects for Project systems ALE Idoc

2840039 - CustConn: ALE distribution for Projects that are in created or partially released status

Keep Exploring!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Build Service not working
entry.content: Hello. We are currently looking into this issue and hope to issue a fix later today. I will confirm when it's in production.

entry.title: Re: Equivalent APP on SAP Hana cloud Public of transactio...
entry.content:
Dear Jerry,

This no equivalent configuration or SSCUI.

You can use extensibility ,custom logic for data transfer. Use the BADI to set billing date.

0002892513 - How to set billing date equal to billing creation date via copy control - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/3714184b72b54dad819a7c398a701152.html

Regards

Sahil Grover

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: New Maintenance Service Process in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content: @adelapava1 You will need to use additional capabilities from SAP Field Service Management (FSM) or SAP S/4HANA Asset Management for resource scheduling. The latter is also known as "RSH" (resource scheduling). As you mention MRS (Multiresource Scheduling), please consider RSH to be the current go-to solution from SAP.

entry.title: Re: Invoice rejected in CIG with Error: not found in Part...
entry.content:
Hello,

Check the note: Error: Binary' not found in Partner Directory (ariba.com)

In addition to that there is one more note I have:

Resolution:

  1. Add a vendor to custom routing
  2. Reprocess the document in the CIG

 

If the error appears despite the custom routing being in place, deploy the custom routing again and reprocess the message.

Comment:

The error happens because of incorrect system ID

Some highly desired functionality! Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Build Service not working

entry.title: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 錯誤: 子訊息 'MSG_20240730_02' 程序失敗
entry.content:
Payload 參考官方文件的「Sample Payload for Full Clearing」

payload如下圖: 欲結清日記帳分錄: 1800000021(DR) 與 1400000013(DZ)

API回傳錯誤訊息如下圖:

  • 子訊息 'MSG_20240730_02' 程序失敗
  • 已同時結清項目 FIVE 2024 1400000013 001

從「管理客戶明細項目」這邊看還是未結清狀態:

以下附上完整Payload:

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_20240730_FULL</ID>
            <CreationDateTime>2024-07-30T13:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            <TestDataIndicator>false</TestDataIndicator>
         </MessageHeader>
         <JournalEntryClearingRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>MSG_20240730_02</ID>
               <CreationDateTime>2024-07-30T13:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
               <AccountingDocumentType>AB</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentDate>2024-07-30</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-07-30</PostingDate>
               <CurrencyCode>TWD</CurrencyCode>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Clearing API</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>CB9980000020</CreatedByUser>
               <APARItems>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
                  <AccountType>D</AccountType>
                   <APARAccount>1000000</APARAccount>
                  <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                  <AccountingDocument>1800000021</AccountingDocument>
                  <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
               </APARItems>
                <APARItems>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
                  <AccountType>D</AccountType>
                   <APARAccount>1000000</APARAccount>
                  <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                  <AccountingDocument>1400000013</AccountingDocument>
                  <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
               </APARItems>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryClearingRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI MFA with SAP Secure Login Service and Microsoft Entra ID
entry.content: Hi, the main reason for the AD Domain Controller is that the user can single sign-on with their hybrid identities for the first authentication factor to the Entra ID tenant by enabling the Entra Cloud Sync or Entra Connect. I think that most of the SAP GUI scenarios already have an existing Domain Controller in place that is configured for Kerberos-based SSO to SAP. Thus, to make this tutorial more realistic, we also start from here, and expand it towards the Cloud with Secure Login Service and Entra ID.

entry.title: Re: Task 12 - Give us feedback about this challenge (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&q
entry.content:
Hi DJ, Thanks for the nice little set of challenges.

One of the things I've been pondering is the different styles for implementing the function / action logic. I know that the documentation mentions examples like:

module.exports = function Sue(){
this.on('sum', ({data:{x,y}}) => x+y)
this.on('add', ({data:{x,to}}) => stocks[to] += x)
this.on('stock', ({data:{id}}) => stocks[id])
this.on('getStock','Foo', ({params:[id]}) => stocks[id])
this.on('order','Foo', ({params:[id],data:{x}}) => stocks[id] -= x)
}

or like the method style like this, variously talking about extending cds.Service of cds.ApplicationService

module.exports = class Sue extends cds.Service {
sum(x,y) { return x+y }
add(x,to) { return stocks[to] += x }
stock(id) { return stocks[id] }
getStock(Foo,id) { return stocks[id] }
order(Foo,id,x) { return stocks[id] -= x }  

I've consistently used a slightly different style - shown below - and it seems to work. 

const cds = require('@sap/cds')
class northbreeze {
 async selectProduct(req) {
  const { communityid } = req.data
  const { ProductName } = await SELECT.one.from(Products).columns(....)
  return `${ProductName}`
 }
}

module.exports = northbreeze 

I've found this style of implementation in the .js file to work, even though I don't find it documented. I use a class with the same name as the service  I don't provide the extends cds.Service or cds.ApplicationService and no init() and this.on etc.  And where I need async I just declare the function as an async function. 
Perhaps another series on implementation approachs of functions and actions?

entry.title: Re: Field Mapping in Sales Order Level
entry.content:
Hello,

You can  use In-app extensibility , Custom fields to add the information 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/3a713139e548434e8a50800e7a7c8172.html 

Regards

Sahil Grover

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of Maintenance Order from Notification

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of Maintenance Order from Notification
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/creation-of-maintenance-order-from-notification/qaq-p/742746

entry.title: What happens with deleted cost accounts in S4HANA after migration?
entry.content:
Hi dear SAP Community,

we are migrating an SAP ECC 6.0 System to S4HANA 2023 SP 01.

In our first testing migration we found some secondary cost accounts in FS00 that where created  in SKA1 table (chart of accounts) but not in the company code. We checked the issue in ECC and found out that it happened for those cost accounts which we don't have transactional data in the current year for.

Table COSS: contains transaction data in 2020 or earlier

Table COKL contains "empty" plan data, means customer planned in KP27 based on "past data'", but didn't actively enter any plan values (only zero values) for the current period 2024.

Finally, these secondary accounts are not needed any more in future, so the idea is, to delete them or mark for deletion in ECC. But what will SUM do with secondary cost accounts in S4HANA, which where deleted in ECC starting with the current period but for which we have old transactional data? Will it be the same result as in the first round or na different behaviour.

Regards

Olga

entry.title: In MRP Wizard, Branch wise warehouse should be Disable #61312
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In the MRP Wizard, step 4 Inventory Data Source, we need to disable the warehouses which are not linked to Branch. For example, if a user has authorized only one Branch then he can access only those warehouses which are linked to specific Branch.

Please share any workaround for the same.

Below is the attached screenshot for your reference.


Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Re: Missing customer/Supplier Migration 2022 FPS01
entry.content: yes

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a great thought! 

I think part of the problem in the circumstance that you're wanting to dig into (which is great) is that at the CDS model level, within a service, an `entity` defines what (when served via the OData adapter) is an entity set in its "resting state", i.e. something naturally resembling a list of items. So if we think about that, then perhaps the cleanest approach would be to embrace that context and define that entity as a singleton, using the @odata.singleton annotation:

 

@odata.singleton
entity TotalProducts as
    select from Products {
        count(ProductID) as count : Integer
    };

 

When requested, e.g. via an HTTP GET request to `/odata/v4/northbreeze/TotalProducts`, we now receive a response with a JSON representation that looks like this:

 

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#TotalProducts",
  "count": 77
}

 

Does that help?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code is now on SAP BTP Trial

Thanks for reply. Could you please let me know how can different the values based on the fiscal year period. Because from source i will get gl account, object and fiscal year then values val1 to valu2.

Pleae expalin.

 

thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content:
Sorry for my late reply and thanks for your extensive answer:

So means in a nutshell, when I create a database table in ADT, it is created using DDIC, correct?

If so this would mean when using ADT I do use DDIC but - however, can not make use of the foreign key relationship feature of DDIC. Is this correct?

entry.title: Solv Protocol invite code: VUB9LL—use it to earn more points!
entry.content: Unlock additional rewards with the Solv Protocol invite code: VUB9LL. By entering this code when you sign up, you'll receive extra points that will enhance your experience from the very beginning. This exclusive offer is designed to give you a head start, providing more benefits and boosting your progress within the platform. Don’t miss this opportunity to maximize your rewards and make the most out of your Solv Protocol experience.

entry.title: Re: Any alternative CDS View for "I_Trrmonitor" and "I_Sl...
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently the CDS View ITRRMONITOR (Data Definition I_TRRMONITOR) is not released.  

Regarding the release of CDS Views can you please see the attached KBA

2838330 - How To Request for New Features for Master Data topics in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Regards

Sahil Grover

entry.title: Re: How to do AUnit testing for multiple classes with sin...
entry.content:
@pawansrirama wrote:

 

[...] i need to do Aunit testing for multiple classes with single AUNIT Test class [...]

That's exactly what you shouldn't do.

 

Each class has its own test class. That's how you ensure F.I.R.S.T.

entry.title: Re: Error message regarding user options for cross company postings
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I found the solution on my own:
> use the APP create incomming invoice
> Choose Editiong options
> Check entry:

If the option is not set, the error message disappear

entry.title: Re: introduction
entry.content:
Hi @mustafa_awad ,

Welcome aboard! Check out the following blog What is SAP SuccessFactors and what do their consultants do?

Regards,

David

entry.title: Splitting Ranges/SQL Statement for avoiding dumps of a job
entry.content:
Hey, 

 

I have the following problem: 

I have a Job that dumps monthly, due to analysis of st22 it is because DBSQL_Stmnt_too_large

I researched a little and came to the conclusion that the ranges are too large for the statement. 

The statement goes sth like this: 

Select x y sum( z ) as profit from dfkkop
into corresponding fields of table rt_profit
where x in it_range_x and 
y in ms_sel-s_y and 
w in ms_sel-s_w and
q in lt_range_q 
group by gpart bukrs. 

Since there are only itabs with type standart table of range with default key and not "real" ranges, im unsure whether i can split the itabs like ranges or not. Im also unsure about how i can split this statement or use for all entries.

entry.title: Re: Org structure in MM

entry.title: Re: TRACE SPAD tcode Changes
entry.content:
You may have a look at ST03N. Eventually you can find which persons did use transaction SPAD.

ST03N - open matching month -> Analysis View: Transaction Profile - Standard -> filter for Task type "Dialog"

entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content:
You still mix the things up.

DDIC (short for ABAP Dictionary) is a metadata repository.

There are two tools for editing metadata such as DDIC database tables of the ABAP Dictionary:

  • SE11 in SAP GUI
  • Source code based editors as well as from based editors in ADT.

"when I create a database table in ADT, it is created using DDIC," is not correct.

Correct is: "you can use ADT (as well as SE11) to create a DDIC database table".

In fact, the source code that you see in ADT isn't even stored as such but created temporarily from the metadata in the ABAP Dictionary.

And also " using ADT I do use DDIC but - however, can not make use of the foreign key relationship feature of DDIC" simply makes no sense,

ADT is a tool for creating repository objects, not for using them. You use a DDIC database table in ABAP language, in ABAP CDS, in classic dynpros, etc. It depends on the usage in these frameworks, whether a foreign key relationship is considered, not on ADT.

entry.title: Re: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 錯誤: 子訊息 'MSG_20240730_02' 程序失敗

entry.title: Re: Org structure in MM
entry.content: @Eric_Yu from both if you need to have a full over for financial performance for projects functions inside the company so i think the better is to make the projects as a plant and assign a profit Centre for projects only

Is it possible to use P&F to define forms but not use workflows? Can you embed the forms in our own fiori app and have our own implementations for workflow and so on?

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Hello DJ,

very interesting command, didn´t know that,

But:

I am Working on a Win11 System with  Docker-Desktop 4.32.0

cds repl remains on v 7.9.3

also "docker system prune" didn´t help 

.... nevertheless - that's the way it is

kind regards, Matthias

----- Dockerfile: --------------------

# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

ARG VARIANT="20"
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/vscode/devcontainers/javascript-node:0-${VARIANT}
ARG CAPVER="latest"

# Install some generally useful tools
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends \
    curl git sqlite3 entr source-highlight

# Install SAP CAP SDK globally
USER node
RUN npm install -g @Sap/cds-dk@$CAPVER

# vi mode everywhere and nicer prompt KTHXBAI
RUN cat <<EOBASHRC >> /home/node/.bashrc
export EDITOR=vi
set -o vi
bind -x '"\C-l": clear'
EOBASHRC

RUN echo 'export PS1=${PS1/\$ /\\\\n$ }' >> /home/node/.bashrc

# Ready!
WORKDIR /home/node
 
----------- devcontainer.json ---------------------
{
    "name": "Basic CAP devcontainer definition",
    "build": {
        "dockerfile": "Dockerfile",
        "args": {
            "VARIANT": "20"
        }
    },
    "customizations": {
        "vscode": {
            "extensions": [
                "sapse.vscode-cds",
                "dbaeumer.vscode-eslint",
                "humao.rest-client",
                "qwtel.sqlite-viewer",
                "mechatroner.rainbow-csv"
            ]
        }
    },
    "forwardPorts": [
        4004
    ],
    "remoteUser": "node"
}

entry.title: Two SAP CodeJam events to be held in Tbilisi!
entry.content:
Are you ready for the future of business computing? #EPAMGeorgia is thrilled to host a series of offline events organized by SAP — SAP Code Jam, where the latest SAP tools - SAP Build and SAP Cloud Application Programming will be introduced.

SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code - Sept. 16th (9:00 - 16:30)
Get hands-on experience with SAP Build, guided by SAP Developer Advocates, Daniel Wroblewski & Shrinivasan Neelamegam. This session is perfect for all interested in SAP, regardless of their level of expertise. Build your business app & process, understand navigation, triggering processes, implementing mobile capabilities, and so much more! 

RSVP:  SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Tbilisi, Georgia) 

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud - Sept. 18th (9:00 - 16:30)
For any experienced SAP developer, we will explore how to combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud. Daniel and Shrinivasan will guide you through creating full-stack applications, deploying and configuring with easy-to-follow steps. 

RSVP:  SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud (Tbilisi, Georgia)  

These interactive, hands-on sessions will be led by experienced SAP Developer Advocates Daniel Wroblewski and Shrinivasan Neelamegam. Join us at EPAM Georgia office, InOffice Building, 10 Bidzina Kvernadze St, Tbilisi, #Georgia.

Don’t miss out - Confirm your spot now! Please note that the language of instruction for these events is English. See you there!

#SAP #SAPCodeJam #SAPBuild #SAPHANACloud #BusinessApp

entry.title: Re: Valuation type addition to material in-OMS2
entry.content:
Hello Mate,

I hope you are referring valuation type to Q/V updating otherwise it is different config (split valuation) to activate Valuation type in material master.
 
OMS2 is used to create new material type where in Quantity / Value updating is case specific.
ROH- By valuation area - Valuated materials.
NLAG- In no valuation area - Non valuated materials.

Try copy as functionality copying SAP standard Material Types for new creation.

also try changing Quantity / Value updating for existing material types after clearing the at least these prerequisites.
a. clear stock to null in both current and past periods.
b. closing all financial documents end to end like PO,SO.

Beware, OMS2 impacts MM-FI integration you have to change valuation classes of all impacted materials.

Thank you
Regards,
Prasad Baraskar.

entry.title: QA32 - Adding Repository Code
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to add the repository code to the place marked in the picture.
Is there an adaptation?

entry.title: Costing Based ADSO
entry.content:
Hello All,

could you please help me to create the costing based ADSO.

Source fieds

GL Account Company Code Fiscal year val1 val2 val3 val4 etc

Target required

GL Account Fiscal year company code fiscal year period amount

here based on the GL Account, company code, fiscal year we need to pick the fiscal year period 

then

if period 001 we need to pick the value  from value1 and store to Amount

if period 002 we need to pick the value  from value2 and store to Amount

So one. 

 

Thanks and Regards,

VenkatC

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I have been involved with SAP for the past year and am eager to pursue a career in SAP project manager. I would be extremely grateful if you could provide me with an opportunity to take the certification exam. This certification would greatly enhance my career prospects.

Thank you for considering my request.

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Stuttgart, DE)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, September 13th in Stuttgart, Germany 🇩🇪 from 10:00 to 16:00 CEST (UTC+2). The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by Bosch Digital at
Bosch IT-Campus, Building No 701, Room no G0.06
Borsigstrasse 4
70469 Stuttgart-Feuerbach, Germany

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 25 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content: Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi @julieplummer20 ,

yep, my hunch is that Apple changed something in their Virtualisation Framework in the spring, and since then neither Docker Desktop nor Podman Desktop and their underlying Engines are able to run SAP CDT instance. However the still existing Apple QEMU Framework is able to do this task, and that is why there is still a way for Apple M-series MacBook users to get SAP CDT working ok.

My plan is to check the situation after new versions of macOS are released, as that is the time when updates to Apple Virtualisation Framework are delivered, to see whether the updated Virtualisation Framework can be used with the Docker Desktop or Podman Desktop for a (faster than QEMU) runtime of SAP CDT.

I was thinking, if ARM-based Windows laptops become popular as they may well do in the coming years, will SAP CDT be runnable on those... and if not, would SAP be interested in making an arm-architecture image of SAP CDT... you can Julie always let me know if you want volunteers for participating in such a project 🙂

Regards, dylan

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content: thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Filter on Account Dimension in SAC Model or Story
entry.content:
Hi William_Yu

I'm trying to apply a filter on the property of my account dimension but i get an error in the table:

Warnings
Server Warning (2)
Invalid filter : Invalid filter, flat filters on attributes of the account dimension are not supported ([VDB.TIPBDG].[VDB.TIPBDG]). Query result may not be as expected.
Invalid filter : Invalid filter, flat filters on attributes of the account dimension are not supported ([VDB.CDR].[VDB.CDR]). Query result may not be as expected.

"VDB" is the account's name, "TIPBDG" and "CDR" are the properties i need to filter in my table

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Nice - there should be no reason why you can't force a rebuild without cache, even on a Windows machine.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA technical replacement for FK01 BDC Create Ven...
entry.content:
Hi Markus,

If you 'just' need to enhance existing suppliers by copying existing company code relevant data to a new company code, then I also think that class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN is a good place to start.
SAP note also describes a possible solution which include that class:
2417298 - Integration of Business Partner with Customer and Supplier Roles - SAP for Me

But if you need to be able to provide input for the company code relevant data on the individual suppliers, I think you should try to look at Fiori app 'Manage Mass Maintenance' (Fiori ID F1047A). It can be used for mass maintenance of business partners. 

BR,
Gitte.

entry.title: Re: Analysis authorizations created in T-CODE RSECADMIN d...
entry.content: Hi If the permissions are * means ok, once again check the missing authorization in the RSECADMIN transaction code.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Introducing Our Summer '24 Release 🌞
entry.content:
We are excited to unveil the latest enhancements in our SAP Marketing Cloud summer ’24 release! 🌞

In this blog, we’ll showcase exciting new features, but don’t miss the comprehensive list on the What’s New in SAP Marketing Cloud release page.

Let's dive into the highlights. 🚀🔍

 

Spam Protection with Friendly Captcha

For an additional captcha provider, besides Google Captcha, we are now partnering with Friendly Captcha, with a “Bring your own license type” of integration. It is straightforward to use when you design your landing page. In the Form editor, a Captcha element is provided to set up captchas for your forms.

 

Figure 1: SAP Marketing Cloud's Form Editor - In the design of the form, you can add a Captcha element and define its attributes.

 

Let’s have a look at the video that our partner provided to give you more insight.

 

Video 1: Friendly Captcha

For more information, see

  • Enhancing Form Security with Friendly Captcha | Application Help 
  • Information in Friendly Capcha 

 

Additional Segmentation Attributes in Group Account Sales Data for Segmentation Object Contacts

Additional amount fields have been added to the segmentation object for Contacts. Now, you can see the sales data from the interactions and use them for segmentation.

Figure 2: Amount attributes in the standard segmentation content. 

For more information, see Amount Attributes | Administration Guide 

 

Double Opt-in and Opt-out Performance Improvement for Inbound Interaction

The double opt-in and double opt-out process is improved by speeding up the inbound interaction handling.

For more information, see Double Opt-In or Opt-Out Process | Application Help 

 

Bot Click Filtering

Use the Bot click filtering to identify interactions that originate from bots compared to CLICK_THROUGH interactions that come from a human being.

SAP Marketing Cloud can reduce the impact of bot clicks. We are not guaranteeing that every bot click is filtered out.

Note that after enabling the feature, you may see a significant decrease in the click-through rate.

 

Watch this video to get more insight.

 

Video 2: Bot Click Filtering.

For more information, see

  • Clicking Links in Emails and Opening Emails | Application Help 
  • Campaigns: Convert BOT_CLICK Interactions to CLICK_THROUGH Interactions | Administration Guide

 

Provide more Transparency on System Health: Check Your Marketing Solution

Review the health checks in the Check Your Marketing Solution app, to obtain information about housekeeping tasks to perform that can optimize your system performance. The health check Checking the Usage of Easy Unsubscribe for Email have been added, as Yahoo and Google enforced the easy unsubscribed.

For more information, see System Health Checks | Administration Guide and SAP Note 3426234.

 

If you have provided easy unsubscribe for all marketing emails that you are sending, you can pause the health check.

Pausing is also available for some other health checks, for example to allow time to correct a situation. During the pause period, no notifications are sent. But with a new release upgrade, the pause is reset, and you get all health checks again.

For more information, see Pausing System Health Checks | Administration Guide 

 

Deduplication

Deduplication is in the SAP Marketing Cloud system for quite some time. In some cases, households or contacts may use the same email address for multiple individuals. The goal is to send only one email with the personalization of the “best” contact, which could be the one with a certain attribute, for example the highest loyalty tier, or the one with most interactions.

Have a look at this video that explains how you can deal with this, it also answers the customer influence request 212731.

 

Video 3: Deduplication

 

Company Logo

Exchange very easily the SAP logo with a customer logo through the parameter COMPANY_LOGO_URL in the Manage Launchpad Settings app. You can upload a file with a company logo, and it will replace the SAP logo for all users, to all themes.

Figure 3: The standard SAP logo image can be replaced with a customer logo.

For more information, see Manage Launchpad Settings | Administration Guide 

 

Heads Up – Replacement of SAP Fiori launchpad home page (Outdated) by Spaces and Pages / Final Removal

With the upgrade to SAP Marketing Cloud 2408 (August 17/18, 2024), and as part of the already announced transition to Spaces and Pages, SAP will change the launchpad settings for Spaces and Pages to Spaces only in your production systems. The change will be irreversible. This means there will be no option to switch back to Groups or to activate the toggling option between Spaces and Pages, and Groups anymore. See Note 2970113.

 

You can take advantage of the new features immediately:

  • Watch the SAP Marketing Cloud | What’s New 2408 webcast to learn more about new product updates with insight from SAP Marketing Cloud experts.
  • Go in-depth on every feature update on the What’s New in SAP Marketing Cloud release page.
  • Get all product details on the SAP Marketing Cloud 2408 product page which is generally available now.
  • Check Out our latest SAP Marketing Cloud Email videos.
  • Stay up to date and sign up for the monthly SAP Marketing Cloud and SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement News.
  • For more information, use this link to the Release Navigator.

Connect with other customers and product experts in the https://community.sap.com/topics/marketing-cloud to get your questions answered.

entry.title: Re: CK11N Issue (Standard Cost Estimate)
entry.content: Hi Bobshen,
